description: This file defines functions and mixins related to Bootstrap's responsive breakpoints, including calculations for minimum and maximum widths, infixes for class naming, and media query mixins for different viewport ranges.

methods.name: breakpoint-next
methods.description: Returns the next breakpoint name after the given one from the list of breakpoint names.

methods.name: breakpoint-min
methods.description: Returns the minimum width for the given breakpoint, or null if it is the smallest.

methods.name: breakpoint-max
methods.description: Returns the maximum width for the given breakpoint, reduced by 0.02px to address browser limitations.

methods.name: breakpoint-infix
methods.description: Returns a string suitable for infix class suffixes, empty for the smallest breakpoint.
